description: CompositionBlue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand swoosh on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cold water with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorationsCrafted from a soft cotton fabric that wicks sweat away and offers exemplary dry comfort all day, this T-shirt from nike is a perfect combination of comfort and sport, and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers and jet set to take on the world in style.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
